ab: Namautang kaku a talacacudadan i nadavak.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: Mapawan kaku a sikavang, natala i cacudadan.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: Awaawa ku nikerid nu maku tu maamaan.
en: I didn’t bring anything with me.

ab: I namicudad, mahkulung kaku atu kaput a mimelaw tu cudad.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: I pisekingan, pacaliwan nu kaput kaku tu sapisurit atu savuric.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: Pasuwal satu ku pasevan’ay itakuwan, “akaa tu kautang, karatar tu a lumuwad haw!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「不要再遲到了，下次早點起床!」
en: The teacher told me, “Wake up earlier next time and don’t be late again!”
